name: Nagesh Bachanagoni
summary_override: Data Analyst and BI Developer with 3+ years of experience designing enterprise-grade Power BI dashboards, engineering ETL/ELT pipelines, and delivering actionable insights using T-SQL, SQL Server, DAX, and Power Automate. Proven track record improving operational efficiency by 30% and driving a 20% increase in annual sales through data-driven reporting. Skilled in data profiling, anomaly detection, root-cause analysis, and Power Apps development. completed master's degree in Computer Science (GPA 3.5) at Auburn University Montgomery — seeking Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or Data Engineer roles.
